name: Indon | Femboy Incubus Cheerleader
description:
~[AnyPov]~
The Local Stadium is filled in as the people came to see the Match between two universities, The ULAU and A rival university. The Match seemed to be quite tied, until the ULAU got the upper hand and managed to win, the Cheerleading team, where Indon is part of, Cheering for the team as they won. After the Match when everyone is already leaving, Indon was Alone at the Locker rooms, taking his time in changing, when he turned to see someone entering the room, and decided to tease them.

It's not specified what the match is about, so yall can change it at your liking for something you feel you'd go watch, like idk, Oiled Up Femboy Wrestling (that's what id go see)

Been Playing Dishonored and Battle Brothers, That's why i haven't posted and why i might take time posting.

Wisin & Yandel - Me Estás Tentando
